REQ-UI-01.description: A valid standard user can log in and reach the inventory page.

REQ-UI-02.description: Invalid credentials (locked-out user / wrong password) show an explicit error.

REQ-UI-03.description: Adding a product updates the cart badge and the cart contents.

REQ-UI-04.description: Removing a product empties the cart badge.

REQ-UI-05.description: Sorting products by price low-to-high orders them ascending.

REQ-UI-06.description: A full checkout confirms the order and the displayed subtotal/tax/total are correct.

REQ-UI-07.description: Checkout rejects a missing first name with a validation error.

REQ-UI-08.description: Logging out returns the user to the login page.

REQ-API-01.description: POST /auth returns a valid authentication token.

REQ-API-02.description: POST /booking creates a booking and echoes the submitted data.

REQ-API-03.description: GET /booking/{id} returns the previously created booking.

REQ-API-04.description: GET /booking returns the list of booking ids.

REQ-API-05.description: PUT /booking/{id} with a token fully updates a booking.

REQ-API-06.description: PATCH /booking/{id} with a token partially updates a booking.

REQ-API-07.description: DELETE /booking/{id} removes a booking; a later GET returns 404.

REQ-API-08.description: Updating a booking without a token is rejected with 403 (negative/security).

REQ-API-09.description: Booking responses conform to the documented JSON Schema contract.

REQ-UNIT-01.description: Cart subtotal sums item prices and rejects negative inputs.

REQ-UNIT-02.description: Sales tax is 8% of the subtotal, rounded half-up.

REQ-UNIT-03.description: Cart total equals subtotal plus tax (supports custom rates).

REQ-UNIT-04.description: JSON Schema validator accepts valid payloads and rejects invalid ones.

REQ-UNIT-05.description: Booking data builder produces valid payloads with overridable fields.

REQ-BDD-01.description: End-to-end checkout scenario expressed in Gherkin is confirmed.
